sample: Monolayer MoS2 on SiO2/Si (CVD-grown, as-deposited, no post-growth annealing or chemical treatment)
notes: Single-flake measurement at the center of a triangular CVD island, spot diameter ~1 um. Sample is as-grown without sulfur-rich annealing or thiol/TFSI surface treatment. Wide spectrometer window (580-820 nm) to capture both excitonic emission and any sub-bandgap features. Background not subtracted; raw spectrometer counts.
